company_summary: Oracle is a global enterprise technology company providing cloud infrastructure, databases, and applications to businesses worldwide. The company is in an aggressive cloud growth phase, competing with AWS and Azure through Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) and SaaS applications like Fusion ERP and NetSuite. Oracle's Services division supports large enterprise customers through consulting, support, and managed cloud services.
fit_indicators: Services strategy roles require understanding of enterprise software delivery — Sudheer has 4 years building and modernising enterprise Java systems inside a large multinational (Renault-Nissan), giving him credibility in how large orgs consume and operate technology services

MBA internship emphasises structured problem-solving and executive communication — Sudheer's Carlson STEM MBA directly satisfies this credential requirement and signals business acumen layered on engineering depth

Oracle Services is investing in AI-augmented service delivery — Sudheer is actively building multi-agent AI systems with Claude API, making him credible on how AI can transform services operations and strategy

Strategy roles at Oracle Services involve cross-functional stakeholder work across product, sales, and delivery — Sudheer's RNTBCI experience required coordination across Nissan, Renault, and Mitsubishi business units, demonstrating enterprise stakeholder fluency

Services strategy intern roles typically involve competitive and market analysis for cloud services — Sudheer's technical background in microservices and cloud modernisation gives him an informed lens to evaluate Oracle's OCI and managed services positioning versus AWS and Azure

contact_targets.title: Senior Director or VP, Oracle Services Strategy
contact_targets.reason: Direct hiring manager or strategy leader for this internship track — highest relevance for understanding what the role actually needs and for making a warm impression pre-application

contact_targets.title: Previous Services Strategy MBA Intern or Associate
contact_targets.reason: Can provide insider view on project scope, team dynamics, and what differentiates successful candidates — also a natural warm outreach peer given shared MBA background

contact_targets.title: University Recruiter, Oracle MBA Programs
contact_targets.reason: Fallback if no strategy contacts are reachable — can confirm application timeline and hiring process for MBA intern cohort
